figures.caption: FIG. 1. ITER-like equilibrium, where the grey contours correspond to ψ, and the shaded regions correspond to the vacuum chamber (blue), blanket (orange), and vessel (black) regions.

FIG. 3. Comparison PINN and true solutions.
